• Search your library for a card named Melesei, the Godslayer, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

cards.rules_text:
Whenever Valla, Master Historian attacks, investigate. [i](Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with “{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.”)[/i]
Whenever an opponent attacks, target attacking creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn.

Vigilance
{T}: The next historic spell you cast this turn has improvise. [i](Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic. Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.)[/i]

[i]History Repeats[/i] — Whenever you cast your first historic spell each turn, copy it, then exile the spell you cast with three time counters on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. [i](Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic. At the beginning of its owner's upkeep, they remove a time counter. When the last is removed, they may play it without paying its mana cost. If it's a creature, it has haste.)[/i]

Choose one —
• Investigate.
• Search your library for a card named Valla, Amateur Scribe, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
• Search your library for a card named Valla, Master Historian, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
• Search your library for a card named Valla, Eternal Observer, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
​
​
